name: South Carolina LLR Contractor License Lookup

agency.name: South Carolina Department of Labor, Licensing and Regulation

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official lookup before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: General and mechanical contractor classifications and subclassifications exposed by the public lookup
knownExclusions: South Carolina Residential Builders Commission credentials use a separate LLR lookup and source entry.
South Carolina DES asbestos contractor licenses use a separate environmental-program lookup and source entry.
Local permits, business registrations, and non-LLR authorizations are outside this source entry.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Do not automate lookup pages unless access terms and technical controls are reviewed.
publicRecordsNotes: Official lookup source metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a license does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: The current state code defines building, highway, public-utility, roofing, solar, swimming-pool, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, mechanical, and related classifications. The source remains a manual handoff because no stable machine-readable lookup contract or bulk export has been reviewed.
maintainerNotes: Keep commercial contractor scope separate from Residential Builders Commission and DES asbestos credentials. Preserve classification and financial-group limitations in any future adapter.

researchEvidence.note: Official public contractor lookup and current access shape reviewed.
Current official Title 40 Chapter 11 classification and subclassification scopes reviewed.
Official board licensure page reviewed for current general and mechanical classifications requiring technical examinations.

blocker.summary: No stable, documented machine-readable official interface is currently suitable for an offline-tested adapter.
